name: controls
description: Spend-authorization/approval control plane over wallets+payments: per-entity/per-agent spend caps, counterparty allowlists, tiered human-approval thresholds, segregation-of-duties, emergency freeze, and an immutable hash-chained money audit. CLI + MCP + serve triad. Local mode uses SQLite at ~/.hasna/controls/controls.db; cloud mode (HASNA_CONTROLS_STORAGE_MODE=cloud) is PURE REMOTE per Amendment A1 with all reads/writes hitting the shared cloud Postgres.
